This class of '''spider droids''' were small, floating [[Battle droid/Legends|combat droids]] that were employed by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Battle of Amaltanna/Legends|Battle of Amaltanna]]. During this battle, several of these [[Droid/Legends|droids]] attacked the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knight]] [[Bultar Swan/Legends|Bultar Swan]]; however, she was able to destroy all of them.

{{Droid-stub}}
